calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David Rucker, Defendant Propria Persona (415) 575-9832, and Moving Party
Steven E. Littman, Esq. (415) 664-1555 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Patel
Babu Patel, Plaintiff
RULING:
HEARING HELD: Defendant David Rucker resumes his testimony; Plaintiff Babu Patel is sworn and examined. Evidentiary evidence is presented to the Court. DEFENDANT DAVID RUCKER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. Defendant shall pay to Plaintiff the sum of $150.00 for attorney fees and costs. Defendant Rucker shall post with the Clerk the amount determined owing for rent by Attorney Littman. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
